List custom PRIO-GRID data folders

Source: R/build_priogrid.R
pg_list_custom.Rd

Scans all custom data folders created by calc_pg() and prints a summary of each configuration. Returns an indexed list of pg_config() objects for direct programmatic use.

Usage

pg_list_custom()

Value

An invisible named list of pg_config objects, one per custom folder. Configs are indexed by position; use [[i]] to select one.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
  customs <- pg_list_custom()
  # [1] abc123/xyz789: nrow=360, ncol=720, 1850-12-31 to 2025-08-26, 3 vars

  read_pg_static(config = customs[[1]])
  calc_pg("new_var", config = customs[[2]])
} # }
